context-monitor.description_zh: 在会话停止时，监控上下文使用情况和健康状态
context-monitor.description_en: Monitors context usage and health status when a session stops

block_reasons.reason: 涉及写文件的子代理必须使用 worktree 隔离

pre-agent-gate.description_zh: 在启动子代理前，检查是否需要 worktree 隔离等安全约束
pre-agent-gate.description_en: Checks safety constraints such as worktree isolation before launching a sub-agent

pre-edit-gate.description_zh: 在编辑现有文件前，检查路径和内容安全性
pre-edit-gate.description_en: Checks path and content safety before editing existing files

pre-write-gate.description_zh: 在写入新文件前，检查路径和内容安全性
pre-write-gate.description_en: Checks path and content safety before writing new files

project-architecture-inject.description_zh: 在用户提交 prompt 时，注入当前项目的架构上下文信息
project-architecture-inject.description_en: Injects the current project's architecture context when a user submits a prompt

recall-capture.description_zh: 在会话停止时，捕获并存储重要上下文到记忆系统
recall-capture.description_en: Captures and stores important context into the memory system when a session stops

recall-entrypoint.description_zh: 在用户提交 prompt 时，从记忆系统检索相关历史上下文
recall-entrypoint.description_en: Retrieves relevant historical context from the memory system when a user submits a prompt

rules-inject.description_zh: 在用户提交 prompt 时，根据关键词匹配注入按需加载的规则文件
rules-inject.description_en: Injects on-demand rule files matched by keywords when a user submits a prompt

block_reasons.reason: Scale assessment required before editing files

scale-gate.description_zh: 在编辑或写入文件前，强制要求先进行规模评估，防止未经规划的大范围改动
scale-gate.description_en: Enforces a scale assessment before file edits or writes to prevent unplanned large-scope changes

session-end-consolidate.description_zh: 在会话结束时，合并整理会话产出的临时数据
session-end-consolidate.description_en: Consolidates and organizes temporary session output when a session ends

skill-inject.description_zh: 在用户提交 prompt 时匹配关键词，推荐相关的 skill，轻量路由不注入 SKILL.md 正文
skill-inject.description_en: Matches keywords in user prompts to recommend relevant skills without injecting full SKILL.md content

rules-library/domain/frontend/ui-logic-d.title: UI / 逻辑解耦后的测试编写规范

rules-library/pattern/auto-created-featu.title: 自动创建的 Feature List 噪音处理

rules-library/technique/rate-limit-manag.title: Claude Code Rate Limit 自动管理

rules-library/technique/skills-cli-disco.title: Skills CLI 发现与安装规范

rules-library/tool/agent-file-operations.title: Agent 文件操作效率规范

rules-library/tool/langchain-runtime-dep.title: LangChain 迁移 Runtime 依赖规范

rules-library/tool/runtime-dependency-re.title: Runtime 依赖自动解决规范

brainstorm.description_zh: 调研与需求发现技能。在实现前进行深度调研，通过 Research-first、Diverge→Converge 方法确保充分理解问题空间。当用户描述开发任务、需要技术选型、需求不明确、存在多种实现路径时触发此技能。也可通过 /brainstorm 命令调用。
brainstorm.description_en: Research and requirement discovery skill. Runs deep pre-implementation research with a Research-first, Diverge-to-Converge approach so the problem space is understood before choosing a solution.

design.description_zh: AI 驱动的 UI 设计技能，引导用户从模糊想法到精美的 .pen 文件设计。 使用 Pencil MCP 工具，覆盖完整工作流：需求收敛（结构化提问明确用户真实需求）、 设计系统对齐（风格指南、token）、自动化生成（batch_design）、视觉验证（截图）、 迭代精修。当用户想要设计 UI、创建界面、构建页面、做原型、布局时使用此技能—— 即使用户只是说"我需要一个仪表盘"或"帮我设计登录页"。也适用于"帮我做 UI"、 "创建 web 应用设计"、"让它好看点"，或任何提及设计页面/屏幕/布局的请求。 如果用户描述了一个应用想法但没有明确要求设计，也考虑此技能是否能帮助他们可视化。
design.description_en: AI-driven UI design skill. Guides users from vague ideas to polished .pen designs through a full Pencil MCP workflow: requirement convergence, design-system alignment, automated generation, visual verification, and iterative refinement.

orchestrate.description_zh: 多代理编排技能。自动将大型任务拆分为子任务，分配给实现者、研究者、审查者等专用 agent，并结合 worktree 隔离协调并行执行。当任务涉及 3 个以上文件、2 个以上领域，或用户提到“并行”“parallel”“orchestrate”“拆分执行”时触发。

pdf.description_zh: 只要用户需要处理 PDF 文件，就使用此技能。包括读取或提取 PDF 中的文本与表格、合并或拆分 PDF、旋转页面、添加水印、创建新 PDF、填写 PDF 表单、加密或解密 PDF、提取图片，以及对扫描版 PDF 做 OCR 以实现可搜索。只要用户提到 .pdf 文件或要求产出 PDF，即可触发。
pdf.description_en: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.

pptx.description_zh: 只要任务涉及 .pptx 文件，无论是输入、输出还是两者兼有，都使用此技能。包括创建幻灯片、路演稿或演示文稿；读取、解析或提取任意 .pptx 文件中的文本；编辑、修改或更新现有演示；合并或拆分幻灯片文件；以及处理模板、版式、演讲备注或评论。只要用户提到“deck”“slides”“presentation”或某个 .pptx 文件名，就应触发。
pptx.description_en: Use this skill any time a .pptx file is involved in any way — as input, output, or both. This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file (even if the extracted content will be used elsewhere, like in an email or summary); editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments. Trigger whenever the user mentions "deck," "slides," "presentation," or references a .pptx filename, regardless of what they plan to do with the content afterward. If a .pptx file needs to be opened, created, or touched, use this skill.

skill-creator.description_zh: 用于创建新 skill、修改和优化现有 skill，并评估 skill 表现。当用户想从零创建 skill、编辑或优化现有 skill、运行评测验证效果、做带方差分析的性能基准，或优化 skill 的 description 以提高触发准确性时使用。
skill-creator.description_en: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
